title: AgentEncryptedFeedPayload
description: Payload for POST /agent/feed-items. Submit an encrypted batch from a single source for SSE relay.

source.description: Platform identifier. Use: 'youtube', 'x', 'news', or a custom string.

ephemeral_public_key.description: Base64-encoded ephemeral P-256 public key for this batch.

source_id.description: Platform-native unique ID (video ID, tweet ID, URL hash, etc.).

encrypted_fields.description: Base64 blob containing iv || ciphertext || authTag for encrypted content fields.

is_discovery.description: false = subscriptions/follows; true = discovery feed item.
